name: ZenoPCB
description: Fluent IoT library for ESP32, ESP8266, UNO R4 WiFi and STM32. WiFi captive-portal provisioning, MQTT (optional TLS), HTTP OTA, Modbus RTU/TCP, Z-Keys telemetry/control, edge alarms, schedules, irrigation and diagnostics — single-include, no external dependencies (ArduinoJson, PubSubClient, TinyGSM, Preferences, FlashStorage, StreamDebugger are vendored).
keywords: iot, esp32, esp8266, uno-r4, stm32, mqtt, wifi, provisioning, captive-portal, ota, modbus, alarm, schedule, irrigation, diagnostics, z-key, zenopcb
